result.summary: Found 2 major visual issues: text truncation in the navigation and game cards being cut off in the carousel layouts.

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam' appears truncated and should read 'Hot Games'. The text is being cut off at the edge of the tab.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the container width or font size to ensure the full 'Hot Games' text is visible, or use text wrapping/abbreviation that doesn't cut off mid-word

issues.description: Game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are horizontally cut off on the right side. The rightmost visible cards show partial content (e.g., 'MAGNI' instead of full game title, 'HYPERD' truncated).
issues.suggestion: Adjust the carousel/grid container width or padding to properly display complete game cards, or implement proper carousel scrolling that fully hides cards outside the viewport rather than showing them partially
